title: Declared Authority Index
description: Schema for normalized authority registry output. Each entry defines a single mutable entity's authority boundary: who may write, what surfaces are exposed, and what invariants are protected.

entity.description: The mutable entity this authority boundary governs.

mutation_authority.description: Whether this entity governs writes to financial, ledger, inventory, order lifecycle, or settlement state.

authority_owner_entity.description: The service or component entities that hold sole mutation authority.

allowed_writers.description: Controllers and services permitted to invoke the authority path.

forbidden_writers.description: Discrete forbidden-zone rules. Each entry is a single prohibition. Must NOT be a concatenated string blob.

mutation_surfaces.description: Specific method calls that constitute the write path.

protected_invariants.description: Invariant IDs protected by this authority boundary.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes from the source document.

source_file.description: Source markdown file this entry was extracted from.
